name: Coles Group Limited.
analysis: COL has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 0% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$24.1550, stop A$22.4581, target A$29.2456 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
